British Heritage Hosts Ltd — Est. 2026

England, as it truly lives

Private cultural experiences in real English homes — curated exclusively for discerning international families visiting England.

"Authentic British Experiences for Discerning Families"

Enquire for Your Family Explore Our Services
Five Signature Experiences

Everything England has to offer — privately

Each experience is arranged exclusively for your family. No other guests. No shared itineraries. No compromise.

01 / 05

Private Family Dinner

A complete traditional Sunday roast in a real English dining room — your host family at the table, your family only.

Discover more →
02 / 05

English Tea

Fine china, three-tiered stands, homemade scones and cakes — the quintessential English tradition in a private home.

Discover more →
03 / 05

Heritage Tour

A personal female British Heritage Guide takes your family through England's most storied landscapes and history.

Discover more →
04 / 05

Private Canal Cruise

England's historic waterways — from a London day cruise to a full narrowboat holiday across the countryside.

Discover more →
05 / 05

Airport & Private Transportation

Private airport transfers and chauffeured hire throughout your stay — meet-and-greet, flight-tracked, professionally driven.

Discover more →
Who We Serve

Two journeys. One platform.

For International Families

Guests

You have explored England's famous landmarks. What you have not found — what very few places in the world can offer — is a genuine invitation inside an English home. That is what BHH arranges, exclusively for your family.

  • Every experience arranged exclusively for your family
  • Exclusively private — every booking, every time
  • Pre-vetted, approved English host families and partners
  • Every family receives a private, personalised proposal from BHH
  • BHH handles everything from first enquiry to final farewell
Enquire for Your Family
For English Families & Professionals

Hosts & Partners

Your English home, your local knowledge, or your professional skill is exactly what our guests are seeking. BHH connects you with international guests, manages all communications, and handles every detail — so you can focus on sharing your home and traditions.

  • Host families — share your home and your English traditions with guests from around the world
  • Heritage Guides — share your knowledge of England's history and landscapes
  • Canal boat operators — private hire partnerships with volume bookings
  • Professional drivers — advance-booked, pre-paid, no uncertainty
  • All partners personally vetted and approved by BHH
Become a Host
The BHH Standard

Why discerning families choose us

01

Exclusively yours

Every BHH experience is arranged for your family alone. No other guests share your host, your guide, or your vessel. Never.

02

Exclusively private

BHH verifies every host, every guide, and every partner before they join the network. Our standard is non-negotiable.

03

Genuinely authentic

Our hosts have deep personal roots in English home life. BHH does not perform Englishness — it opens the door to it.

04

Platform-only

All bookings, communications, and payments flow through the BHH platform. Your privacy and your family's details are protected at every step.

05

Enjoy Your Experience

Your privacy is guaranteed. Every proposal is crafted exclusively for your family — personal, private, and tailored to your visit.

06

Registered in England

British Heritage Hosts Ltd is registered in England and Wales (Company No. 17103555). A real company with real accountability.

The Guest Journey

From first enquiry to lasting memory

01

Enquire

Tell us about your family, your preferred dates, and the experiences that interest you. No commitment required.

02

Receive your proposal

BHH prepares a personal proposal tailored to your family, describing the full experience. Your proposal is sent to you privately.

03

Confirm and pay

Accept your proposal and make full payment through the BHH platform. Your booking is immediately activated.

04

Experience England

Arrive, be welcomed, and experience an England that almost no visitor ever sees. Your family. Your evening. Your memory.

Privacy Policy

British Heritage Hosts Ltd (“BHH”, “we”, “our”, “us”), Company No. 17103555, registered at Monomark House, 27 Old Gloucester Street, London WC1N 3AX, is committed to protecting the privacy of every guest, host, and partner who engages with our services. This policy explains how we collect, use, store, and protect your personal data in accordance with the UK General Data Protection Regulation (UK GDPR) and the Data Protection Act 2018.

1. Information We Collect

We may collect: full name, title, and contact details; country of residence, city, and nationality; dietary requirements and allergy information; Enhanced DBS certificate status (hosts and partners); payment and billing information (processed by Airwallex); feedback and rating data; and any additional information you voluntarily provide.

2. How We Use Your Information

We use your data to: respond to enquiries and prepare proposals; process bookings, payments, and cancellations; match guests with suitable hosts; verify host and partner credentials; send pre-experience briefings and post-experience feedback requests; improve our services; and comply with legal obligations.

3. Legal Basis for Processing

We process your data on the basis of: contractual necessity (to fulfil services); legitimate interest (to operate and improve our business and protect safety); consent (where explicitly agreed, such as marketing); and legal obligation (to comply with applicable laws).

4. Data Sharing

We do not sell your personal data. We may share data with: approved hosts and partners (to deliver your experience); Airwallex (for payment processing); and professional advisors or regulatory authorities where required by law.

5. Data Retention

Booking and transaction records: 7 years. Rating and feedback data: 36 months, then anonymised. Unsuccessful applications: 12 months, then deleted. Marketing preferences: until you withdraw consent.

6. Your Rights

Under the UK GDPR, you have the right to access, correct, delete, restrict, or port your personal data, and to withdraw consent at any time. Contact us at [email protected].

7. Data Security

We implement appropriate technical and organisational measures to protect your data. Payment data is handled by our PCI-compliant payment partner and is never stored on our systems.

8. Cookies

Our website uses essential cookies only. We do not use tracking, advertising, or third-party analytics cookies.

9. Changes to This Policy

We may update this policy from time to time. Changes will be posted on this page with an updated date.

10. Contact Us

British Heritage Hosts Ltd, Monomark House, 27 Old Gloucester Street, London WC1N 3AX. Email: [email protected]. You also have the right to lodge a complaint with the ICO at ico.org.uk.

Last updated: April 2026

Terms of Service

These terms (“Terms”) govern your use of the services provided by British Heritage Hosts Ltd (“BHH”), Company No. 17103555, Monomark House, 27 Old Gloucester Street, London WC1N 3AX. By submitting an enquiry, making a booking, or applying to become a host or partner, you agree to be bound by these Terms.

1. Our Services

BHH provides premium, enquiry-based hospitality experiences connecting international families with approved hosts across England. Services include Private Family Dinners, English Afternoon Teas, British Heritage Guide tours, Private Canal Cruises, and Airport & Private Transportation. All services are bespoke, subject to availability, with prices provided individually upon enquiry.

2. Bookings and Payment

All bookings are confirmed only upon receipt of full payment, processed securely through Airwallex. A booking reference will be issued upon confirmation. BHH reserves the right to decline any booking at its discretion.

3. Cancellation Policy

More than 14 days before: full refund. 7 to 14 days before: 50% refund. Less than 7 days: no refund, unless BHH can rearrange to an alternative date. If BHH cancels: full refund.

4. Guest Responsibilities

Guests must provide accurate information including dietary requirements, allergies, and group size. Guests must arrive on time; late arrivals may reduce the experience duration without price adjustment. Guests must treat hosts, their homes, and property with respect. BHH may terminate an experience if behaviour is disruptive or unsafe.

5. Host and Partner Standards

All hosts and partners are independently vetted and must hold a valid Enhanced DBS certificate. They operate as independent service providers, not employees of BHH. Performance is monitored through a mandatory two-way rating system.

6. Dietary and Allergy Information

Guests must disclose all dietary requirements and allergies at booking. While hosts make every reasonable effort to accommodate requests, BHH cannot guarantee a completely allergen-free environment in private homes.

7. Limitation of Liability

BHH acts as an intermediary connecting guests with independent hosts and partners. BHH is not liable for loss, injury, or damage arising from the actions or omissions of hosts, partners, or guests. Our total liability shall not exceed the amount paid for the relevant booking. Nothing in these Terms excludes liability for death or personal injury caused by negligence, fraud, or any liability that cannot be excluded by law.

8. Intellectual Property

All website content is the property of British Heritage Hosts Ltd and is protected by copyright. Reproduction without prior written consent is prohibited.

9. Feedback and Ratings

Following each experience, both guests and hosts are required to submit feedback. Ratings are confidential and used solely to maintain and improve service quality.

10. Governing Law

These Terms are governed by the laws of England and Wales. Disputes shall be subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of the courts of England and Wales.

11. Changes to These Terms

We may update these Terms from time to time. Continued use of our services constitutes acceptance of the revised Terms.

12. Contact Us

British Heritage Hosts Ltd, Monomark House, 27 Old Gloucester Street, London WC1N 3AX. Email: [email protected]
